citation: Competition and Consumer Act 2010 — Schedule 2, s 29 (Comparative claims)
summary: Comparative claims must be accurate and substantiated; false comparisons may breach the Australian Consumer Law.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Versus, better-than, or market leadership comparisons. ACTION: WARN — require substantiation before publication. CHECK: Named competitor, test method, and comparison date. ESCALATE IF: False or misleading comparative claim.
